description: Public/open-licensed PDF fixtures for document-processing evaluation. Test-only (not customer sample data). Used by the gated ingestion eval to validate auto-detection, Docling processing per profile, and quality metrics. One representative document per profile.
license_note: arXiv papers are distributed under arXiv's non-exclusive license / open terms (authors retain copyright; redistribution for research/testing is permitted). The financial-statement sample and the overall sample set originate from the opendataloader-pdf project (Apache-2.0). The Bill of Rights scan is a U.S. federal/public-domain work (17 U.S.C. 105). All are safe to commit for testing.

fixtures.notes: Text-rich multi-page paper. Validates the semantic profile and multi-page navigation.
Financial statement with embedded tables in prose. Auto-detect returns 'semantic' by design (tables not auto-detected); use --profile tables. Validates TableFormer extraction (yields table chunks).
Multi-page paper with figures. Validates auto-detect 'multimodal' and the multimodal profile (light SmolVLM image descriptions; approximate).
Scanned image; ~0 extractable text. Validates auto-detect 'scanned' and the scanned OCR profile (RapidOCR PP-OCRv4). Single page — replace with a multi-page scan when a clean-licensed one is found.
